overview: The Marathon County Executive Committee met briefly in open session before voting unanimously to enter closed session to discuss the performance review of the county administrator. The committee had received board feedback and scoring on the administrator's evaluation prior to this meeting.

agenda.item: Performance review of the administrator (closed session consideration)

discussions.body: The chair explained that the committee had the option to enter closed session to discuss the final performance review of the county administrator, incorporating board feedback received the previous Thursday. The evaluation used a three-tier rating system (needs improvement, successful, exceptional) with scores averaged on a 0-5 scale. When asked if anyone wanted to go into closed session, the committee proceeded to vote. A motion was made and seconded, and the roll call vote passed unanimously with all members voting aye: Gibbs, Dickinson, Arstead, Boots, Drebeck, Fifick, Mask, Ritter, Morash, and Robinson.

actionItems: Committee entered closed session to finalize the county administrator's performance evaluation
title: Marathon County Executive Committee Meeting
